message:
fix(test): propagate cancel to child region in conformance harness

The conformance_cancel_propagates_down test was missing the
on_region_cancel call for the child region, causing the oracle to
report CancelNotPropagated. The cancel propagation invariant (#6)
requires all child regions to be cancelled when the parent is cancelled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
